_comment: cp-vs-v argmax (T=0) tournament. Both sides drive the patched binary's evallegal protocol; the only difference is which per-move score they argmax over (normalized cp vs raw NNUE Value v). Openings are 4 random plies, deterministic from master_seed; each opening is played twice with sides swapped to cancel first-move advantage. Adjust n_pairs and n_workers to suit your hardware and the precision you need on the Elo CI.
